[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110001000 3
1 0001111101 6
2 1111111011 9
3 1111011010 7
4 1111001000 5
5 1011111101 8
6 1001100111 6
7 1111111101 9

01 10 1011000010 4
12 21 1011011010 6
23 32 0100001101 4
34 43 0010001001 3
45 54 1101111001 7
56 65 0010001010 3
67 76 0011111000 5
70 07 1010010111 6

02 20 0000011000 2
13 31 1111010111 8
24 42 0110000100 3
35 53 1111110000 6
46 64 1111110011 8
57 75 0001110010 4
60 06 1001101111 7
71 17 0001010101 4

14 41 1101011110 7
25 52 1011111101 8 match 5
36 63 1101111010 7
47 74 1100001011 5
50 05 1011100101 6
61 16 0010101101 5
72 27 1010001111 6

15 51 0000100111 4

37 73 1110000010 4
